summary: Completed comprehensive testing of KXGRID Brand Management System. All 25 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI testing verified all CRUD operations, visibility toggle, and brand tiles display in Student Dashboard.

backend_api_tests: GET /api/brands returns list of visible brands only
GET /api/brands brands have required fields (brand_id, name, description, color, is_visible)
GET /api/admin/brands requires admin role (403 for student)
GET /api/admin/brands returns all brands including hidden
POST /api/admin/brands admin can create brand with full data
POST /api/admin/brands admin can create brand with minimal data (defaults applied)
PUT /api/admin/brands/{id} visibility toggle works (hidden brand not in public endpoint)
All 13 default brand names present (KX CORE, KX PRO, KX LAB, etc.)
Full CRUD flow test passed (Create → Read → Update → Delete)
frontend_ui_tests: 13 brand cards displayed with edit, delete, visibility toggle, logo upload buttons
+ NEW BRAND button visible and functional
Create Brand modal opens with name, description, color, visibility fields
Brand creation works - 'Brand created!' toast shown
Edit Brand modal opens with pre-filled data
Brand update works - 'Brand updated!' toast shown
Visibility toggle works - 'Brand hidden'/'Brand shown' toasts shown
Hidden badge appears on hidden brands
KX Ecosystem section visible with 'Explore the brands within our platform' subtitle
13 brand tiles displayed with names, descriptions, and color-coded icons

admin_brand_management.view_brands_tab: ✓ Working - Shows all 13 brands with management controls
admin_brand_management.create_brand: ✓ Working - Modal with name, description, color, visibility
admin_brand_management.edit_brand: ✓ Working - Updates name, description, color, visibility
admin_brand_management.logo_upload: ✓ Working - Upload button present, validates image type

student_dashboard.brand_tiles: ✓ Working - Shows 13 visible brands with name, description, color

api_endpoints.admin_brands: ✓ GET /api/admin/brands - Returns all brands including hidden

seed_data_creation: 13 default KX brands already seeded: KX CORE, KX PRO, KX LAB, KX MEDIA, KX TECH, KX RACING, KX BUSINESS, KX ACADEMY, KX EVENTS, KX DESIGN, KX SAFETY, KX GLOBAL, KX PARTNERS
context_for_next_testing_agent: Brand Management System fully tested and working. All 13 default KX brands are seeded. CRUD operations, visibility toggle, and logo upload all functional. Student Dashboard displays brand tiles correctly. No issues found.
